notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, third baseman Brooks Lee to second baseman Kody Clemens to first baseman Royce Lewis. Jose Altuve scores. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cam Smith reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Kody Clemens. Brice Matthews to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes plunked
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes hit by pitch. Yordan Alvarez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews grounds into a force out, third baseman Brooks Lee to second baseman Kody Clemens. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Brice Matthews to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cam Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith grounds into a double play, shortstop Tristan Gray to second baseman Kody Clemens to first baseman Royce Lewis. Brice Matthews out at 2nd. Cam Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers flies out to first baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Royce Lewis, assist to third baseman Brooks Lee. Jose Altuve to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews flies out to center fielder Ryan Kreidler.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Yainer Diaz challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Royce Lewis steals (6) 3rd base.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Kody Clemens. Brice Matthews to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Kody Clemens. Brice Matthews to 2nd.
